name: Hindmata Junction
source_note: BMC flood map 2023; consistently deepest underpass in Dadar ward
description: Notorious underpass that floods within 30 min of heavy rain. Often impassable.

name: Milan Subway
source_note: Times of India flood coverage 2017-2023; railway subway
description: Railway underpass, pumping station frequently overwhelmed during peak monsoon.

name: Andheri Subway
description: Underpass connecting Andheri East-West; floods when Western Railway line area drains.

name: King's Circle
source_note: Hindustan Times 2022 floods; Central Railway underpass area
description: Junction near Matunga; road dips create pooling. Bus stops often submerged.

name: Chunabhatti Junction
description: Low-lying junction where Mithi River backflow combines with surface runoff.

name: Kurla LBS Road
source_note: BMC K-West ward 2023; chronic drainage failure
description: Lal Bahadur Shastri Road stretch near Kurla station floods reliably every season.

name: Dharavi 90 Feet Road
description: Flat terrain near Mithi River, floods early and drains slowly.

name: Sion Circle
description: Busy junction; moderate flooding, usually clears within 2 hours post-rain.

name: Parel TT Junction
source_note: F-North ward; old mill area drainage issues
description: Former mill district; legacy drainage inadequacy. Moderate risk.

name: Bhandup Complex
description: Industrial area near Powai Lake outlet, floods during sustained rain.

name: Vikhroli Junction
description: Low section of LBS Marg near Vikhroli; consistent moderate flooding.

name: Ghatkopar LBS Marg
description: Stretch near Ghatkopar station underpass; steady pooling risk.

name: Santacruz Airport Road
description: Access road to airport; lower elevation sections pool after heavy showers.

name: Malad Subway
source_note: P-North ward; railway subway chronic flooding
description: Subway floods within 20 minutes of heavy rain onset. One of the worst subway points.

name: Goregaon RMK Road
description: Depressed section on Ram Mandir Road; moderate pooling.

name: Jogeshwari Subway
source_note: K-West ward; similar profile to Milan Subway
description: Railway underpass, frequently blocked by floodwater. Avoid during heavy rain.

name: Bandra Reclamation
description: Low reclaimed coastal area, tide-sensitive. Risk spikes 2 hours around high tide.

name: Worli Sea Face Road
description: Sea-facing road; overtopping risk at high tide combined with storm surge.

name: Haji Ali Junction
description: Coastal junction near Haji Ali causeway; tidal flooding risk.

name: Matunga East Station Road
description: Dips near the station approach; moderate flooding, usually passable.

name: GTB Nagar Junction
description: Low-lying road near nullahs; moderate risk during sustained rain.

name: Powai Lake Road
description: Risk mainly during extreme events when Powai Lake overflows.

name: Mankhurd Junction
source_note: M-East ward; low elevation near creek
description: Near Thane Creek; susceptible to backwater flooding from tidal creeks.

name: Mulund Check Naka
description: Occasional flooding at the highway entry check point; low-moderate risk.

name: Borivali IC Colony
description: Colony roads flood and stay flooded for hours due to poor outlet drains.

name: Kandivali Subway
description: Subway floods quickly; similar risk profile to Malad Subway.

name: Dahisar Naka
description: Moderate risk near Dahisar River bridge; lower severity than central spots.

name: Thane Creek Bridge Approach
description: Approach roads flood during very high tides; tidal dependency high.

name: Wadala Truck Terminus
description: Flat industrial area; poor drainage leads to consistent flood pooling.

name: Elphinstone Road Bridge
description: Bridge approach road; drainage overwhelmed in heavy rain.

name: Byculla Bridge
description: Old bridge approaches; flooding affects pedestrian and vehicle flow.

name: Masjid Bunder Road
description: Dense commercial area near port; regular deep flooding affecting freight movement.

name: Colaba Causeway
source_note: A-Ward coastal; infrequent but notable when it floods
description: Southern tip; flooding uncommon but significant when tidal surge coincides with rain.

name: Ghatkopar Junction (Station Road)
description: High-traffic junction near Metro and rail interchange; flooding disrupts connectivity.

name: Versova Road
description: Coastal locality, tidal sensitivity. Lower risk but worsens at high tide.

name: Thane Station Road (West)
source_note: TMC flood records 2022; station exit area
description: Station approach road floods quickly; heavy footfall zone makes conditions hazardous.

name: Kopri Bridge Approach
description: Near Ulhas River; bridge approach roads flood during high river levels.

name: Mhatre Nagar Junction
source_note: TMC area; low-lying locality flood report 2021
description: Flat residential area with poor stormwater drainage; floods within an hour of rain.

name: Cadbury Junction
source_note: TMC; busy junction near Ghodbunder Road
description: High-traffic junction; road dips cause pooling during heavy monsoon spells.

name: Naupada Junction
description: Low-lying road near nullah; moderate flooding typical during monsoon afternoons.

name: Kalwa Bridge Approach
description: Ulhas River bridge approach; floods severely during peak monsoon river discharge.

name: Mumbra Bypass Road
source_note: Thane–Mumbra bypass; hill runoff concentration point
description: Hill runoff from Parsik Hills concentrates here; bypass road floods rapidly.

name: Diva Junction
source_note: Diva–Vasai corridor; flat terrain near creek
description: Junction near creek; road floods and cuts Diva-Daighar connectivity.

name: Vashi Sector 10 Road
description: Sector road near nullah; flooding affects connectivity to Vashi railway station.

name: Turbhe Naka
source_note: MIDC Turbhe industrial zone; CIDCO report 2023
description: Industrial zone junction; MIDC area drains poorly, causing major road waterlogging.

name: Airoli Sector 6 Road
description: Low-lying sector road near Thane Creek arm; tidal backwater flooding risk.

name: Ghansoli Junction
description: Road near creek inlet; moderate flooding risk during sustained rain and high tide.

name: Kopar Khairane Road
description: Road near nullah corridor; flooding extends into residential access roads.

name: Sanpada Flyover Approach
description: Approach to elevated road floods from below; diverts traffic significantly.

name: Nerul Sector 21 Road
description: Sector road near Palm Beach Marg; tidal flooding risk during high tide + rain.

name: CBD Belapur Junction
source_note: CIDCO CBD Belapur; main junction flooding 2022
description: Busy CBD junction; road dips and poor drainage cause significant monsoon flooding.

name: Kharghar Sector 35 Road
description: Hill runoff from Kharghar hills accumulates on sector roads during heavy rain.

name: Panvel Old Market Road
source_note: Panvel Creek proximity; Panvel municipal records 2023
description: Near Panvel Creek; market area floods deeply and frequently during monsoon.

name: Kamothe Sector 5 Road
description: Low-lying sector road; flash flooding risk from surrounding hill catchment.

name: Trans-Harbour Bridge (Airoli Side)
description: Bridge approach road; tidal flooding risk on the Airoli interchange during high tide.

name: Jasai Junction (JNPT Road)
source_note: Uran Municipal Council / local news reports 2023
description: Highly flood-prone junction near JNPT container yards; poor drainage due to construction.

name: Dronagiri Node (Uran Bypass)
description: Low-lying reclaimed land near creek; high-tide combined with rain leads to backwater overflow.

name: Funde Village Junction
description: Low elevation area where tidal gates are frequently closed during high tide, trapping rainwater.

name: Bokadvira Nullah stretch
source_note: Environmental group reports on wetlands blockage
description: Blocked natural waterway near residential colonies causes rapid waterlogging during heavy downpours.

name: Dungi Village (Airport Area)
source_note: Navi Mumbai Airport local action committee flood reports
description: Adjoining NMIA runway construction; natural drains diverted leading to chronic deep flooding.

name: Kombadbhuje Nullah Crossing
description: Adjacent to mangrove reclamation; tidal backwater combines with heavy rainwater runoff.

name: Ulwe Sector 19/20 Arterial Road
description: Low-lying residential connector road; drains get blocked by construction debris.

name: Belapur-Ulwe Flyover Base (Sector 3)
source_note: Times of India Navi Mumbai monsoon reports
description: Depressed road stretch beneath flyover; runoff from surrounding slopes creates deep pooling.

name: Borivali SV Road (National Park Subway)
description: Underpass and highway crossing near National Park. Water pools rapidly due to slope runoff.

name: Borivali Gorai Creek Road
description: Low coastal stretch near Gorai jetty; floods during high tides combined with heavy rainfall.

name: Dahisar Subway (Dahisar West)
source_note: R-North ward chronic flood spot map
description: Extremely flood-prone subway connecting East and West Dahisar. Closed during heavy spells.

name: Dahisar East (Ketkipada Road)
source_note: BMC local ward water logging logs
description: Hilly runoff from SGNP forest accumulates on local roads in Dahisar East.

name: Mira Road Station Road (Sheetal Nagar)
description: Chronically waterlogged commercial strip near the station due to flat terrain.

name: Bhayandar West (Jesal Park)
source_note: MBMC environmental study on creek-side settlements
description: Low-lying residential area near Vasai Creek. High tide causes seawater backflow.

name: Mira Road (Mulshi Compound / Kashimira)
description: Junction of Western Express Highway and Ghodbunder Road approach; prone to pooling.

name: Vasai Road Station East (Sai Nagar)
description: Low road levels near the station; drains get choked with silt.

name: Nallasopara Subway (Achole Road)
source_note: Times of India Nallasopara flooding coverage 2023
description: Consistently submerged underpass in Nallasopara. Pumping stations fail during heavy downpours.

name: Virar West (Viva College Road)
description: Flat terrain with poor storm water drainage, floods during continuous rain.

name: Naigaon East (Juchandra road)
description: Road sections near the railway bridge flood, blocking access to the station.

name: Dadar Chowpatty (S.K. Bole Road)
source_note: BMC flood maps; coastal seaface logging
description: High tide overtopping and storm drain backflow near Shivaji Park / Dadar beach.

name: Andheri West S.V. Road (Station Road)
description: S.V. Road outside station floods rapidly; major traffic bottleneck connecting West-East.

name: Andheri East Gundavali (WEH Metro)
description: Service road of Western Express Highway pools water due to metro construction drainage alterations.

name: Kurla West Bail Bazar (Kamani Junction)
source_note: L-Ward disaster reports; chronic Mithi River overflow
description: Low basin near Mithi River bank; floods severely when river level rises.

name: Sion West (Sion Station Road)
source_note: F-North ward reports on railway line pooling
description: Low road level outside Sion railway station; floods quickly affecting train services.

name: Khar Subway
source_note: BMC disaster management alerts; chronic subway pumping station
description: Underpass connecting Khar East & West. Regularly closed during intense downpours due to low clearing height.

name: Juhu Tara Road
description: Main arterial road along Juhu beach. High-tide tidal surges cause drainage backflow and heavy pooling.

name: Chembur Shell Colony Road
description: Reclaimed low-elevation residential enclave. Water logging persists for hours post-rain.

name: Mulund West LBS Road (near J&J)
description: Low road grade on Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg; stormwater drain capacity easily overwhelmed.

name: Nana Chowk (Grant Road)
description: Busy intersection in South Mumbai; depression in road structure leads to significant pooling.

name: Kalamboli Circle (Sion-Panvel Highway)
source_note: NMMC traffic police reports; chronic highway bottleneck
description: Major intersection of Sion-Panvel Highway, NH4, and Mumbai-Pune Expressway. Heavy water pooling disrupts all outbound traffic.

name: Kalamboli Sector 1E (McDonalds junction)
description: Low road grade near residential and commercial sectors; drains get clogged by heavy silt.

name: Mansarovar Railway Underpass
source_note: Central Railway monsoon log; commuter complaints
description: Underpass below the railway line connecting Sector 11 to station road; water rises quickly making it impassable for small cars.

name: Mansarovar Sector 11 Nullah Road
source_note: Local resident welfare association flood mapping
description: Road running parallel to the main storm water channel; overflows during heavy rain + high tide.

name: Kharghar Hiranandani Chowk (Sector 3)
description: Busy roundabout near Hiranandani complex; runoff from hills mixes with local street water.

name: Kharghar Kopra River Junction
description: Junction near the Kopra river bridge; vulnerable to river swelling and backwater flooding.
